name: WPM Basic Maintenance Update
query: Run WordPress maintenance updates on this site
expected_behavior: Step 1: Check current WordPress version and plugin status
Step 2: Enable maintenance mode (WooCommerce > ASE Pro > .maintenance fallback)
Step 5: Update free plugins (excluding premium list)
Step 6: Update premium plugins via update-premium-plugins.sh
success_criteria: Maintenance mode enabled before any updates
Premium plugins excluded from bulk update
